text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmm, where else can I improve?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, greetings. May I have some of<n>your time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I've been puzzling<n>over how to
improve my times, but I<n>have been unable to
come up with any<n>ideas.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you were to offer your own racer<n>advice, what
would you say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Stamina and guts, you say? I feel asthough I have been focusing onthem...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose you are quite right. No<n>amount of
training can ever be<n>enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for your advice.<n>I shall
start training at once!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My start, you say? You may have a<n>point. I don't
think I have put much<n>focus on it before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But if I mean to reach greater heights,<n>it may be
necessary to anticipate how<n>races will pan out
from the very start.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for your advice.<n>I shall
incorporate this into my training<n>at once!
